name: hugeicons-ui
title: Hugeicons UI
description: Search, preview, bookmark, and use Hugeicons icons across Raycast and Raycast AI.
author: adnan_tresnjo

commands.name: browse-hugeicons
commands.title: Browse Hugeicons
commands.description: Search and preview icons from Hugeicons

commands.name: bookmarks
commands.title: View Bookmarks
commands.description: Browse and manage your saved icons

commands.name: preferences
commands.title: Configure Settings
commands.description: Configure grid size, colors, primary actions, and bookmark folders

commands.name: create-folder
commands.title: Create Bookmark Folder
commands.description: Create a new folder to organize bookmarked icons

tools.name: search-hugeicons
tools.title: Search Hugeicons
tools.description: Search Hugeicons by natural language, keyword, tag, category, or icon name.

tools.name: get-hugeicon-details
tools.title: Get Hugeicon Details
tools.description: Inspect a specific Hugeicons icon and return its available styles and metadata.

tools.name: get-hugeicon-code
tools.title: Get Hugeicon Code
tools.description: Return Hugeicons SVG or component code for a specific icon.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Hugeicons API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Enter your Universal License Token to unlock Hugeicons Pro icons and styles

preferences.name: gridSize
preferences.title: Grid Size
preferences.description: Number of columns in the icon grid

preferences.name: quickAction
preferences.title: Primary Search Action
preferences.description: Choose what pressing Enter does in Browse Hugeicons
